name: mutsuki-plugin-dev-codex-runner
description: Dev-only Codex runner bridge for Mutsuki protocol smoke tests.

interface.shortDescription: Run Codex through a dev-only Mutsuki protocol runner.
interface.longDescription: Adds bridge scripts for testing Codex-backed Mutsuki runner behavior without making Codex part of the runtime core or standard plugin set.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the Mutsuki dev Codex runner for protocol smoke tests.
